data.title: VEON’s Banglalink to Bring Starlink Mobile to Customers in Bangladesh
data.description: VEON and Starlink Mobile have collaborated to provide direct-to-device satellite connectivity to users in Bangladesh, making it the third market to benefit from this partnership. This collaboration aims to enhance access to reliable communication services for individuals in Bangladesh.

data.title: Coffee sector leaders launch industry-first global mapping initiative to accelerate the transition towards a deforestation-free coffee sector
data.description: Leaders in the coffee sector have introduced a groundbreaking global mapping initiative aimed at fast-tracking the shift towards a coffee industry that is free from deforestation. This initiative marks a significant step forward in addressing environmental concerns within the sector. By implementing this industry-first mapping project, key players in the coffee industry are striving to make a tangible difference and promote sustainable practices. This initiative is poised to have a widespread impact on the sector, with the potential to revolutionize how coffee is sourced and produced globally.

data.title: Webcast details for Orrön Energy’s Q1 presentation
data.description: On Wednesday, May 6, 2026, Orrön Energy AB, also known as Orrön Energy, is set to release its financial report for the first quarter of the year. This publication is scheduled for 07:30 CEST, with a subsequent webcast to take place at 14:00 CEST on the same day.
Invitation to Q1 2026 Results Webcast/Conference Call

data.title: 500 Culinary Leaders from JRE-Jeunes Restaurateurs Unite to Seed the Future of Gastronomy
data.description: The 2026 International Congress of JRE-Jeunes Restaurateurs in Cologne wrapped up after two lively days with 500 attendees, comprising over 400 chefs and restaurateurs from 21 nations. The event took place on April 19-20, focusing on the theme RE•GENERATION.

data.title: Vodafone Business Launch New AI and Cybersecurity Solutions to Accelerate Small Business Digital Transformation in Partnership with Google Cloud
data.description: Vodafone Business and Google Cloud have unveiled two groundbreaking services as part of their strategic partnership, representing a significant advancement in their collaboration. These new offerings, the managed security service and AI concierge service, signify a major development in the $1 billion partnership. The announcement was made at Cloud Next '26 in Las Vegas on April 22, 2026. This latest milestone showcases the continued growth and innovation resulting from the strategic alliance between Vodafone Business and Google Cloud.

data.title: Trump Family-Backed World Liberty Financial Hit With Lawsuit By Justin Sun: Crypto Billionaire Says He Was Left With 'No Choice'
data.description: Crypto entrepreneur Justin Sun has taken legal action against the Trump family-backed cryptocurrency platform, World Liberty Financial. Sun, the founder of Tron (TRX), filed a lawsuit in a California federal court, citing the need to protect his rights as a WLFI token holder. Despite attempting to resolve the issue amicably, Sun claims that the project team refused to release his frozen tokens and threatened to destroy them by burning. As a result, Sun felt compelled to pursue legal recourse. In a statement, Sun emphasized his support for President Trump and the administration's pro-crypto initiatives while outlining his motivations for the lawsuit. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Umbra shuts front end to block Kelp exploiters; smart contracts remain vulnerable.
data.description: Umbra recently took action to halt all activities on its front end in order to prevent unauthorized access by hackers. However, the company clarified that it is unable to prevent the continued operation of its smart contracts or the utilization of an alternative iteration of its open-source front end. The decision to close down the front end was made to enhance security measures, even though it remains incapable of entirely stopping the functioning of essential components such as smart contracts and alternative front-end platforms.

data.title: US law firm apologizes for AI errors in legal filing. Firm has policies to prevent mistakes, but procedures weren't followed.
data.description: Andrew Dietderich of Sullivan & Cromwell highlighted that their company has established AI policies to avoid inaccurate citations and errors. However, these procedures were not adhered to in this particular instance.
LFG!!! We’re finally seeing an LTA for InP substrates.

data.title: Samsung Biologics Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, a company reported a revenue of KRW 1,257 billion and an operating profit of KRW 581 billion. The strong performance was attributed to full utilization across Plants 1 through 4 and effective operational strategies. The company also focused on future growth by expanding operations in the U.S. and forming strategic partnerships.

data.title: Valeura Charters the Enterprise Drilling Rig
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Valeura Energy Inc. (TSX:VLE, OTCQX:VLERF) announced its agreement to charter the Shelf Drilling Enterprise jack-up drilling rig for a period of three years until December 31, 2029. Valeura holds the right to determine the start date, with intentions to begin drilling activities in Q4 2026. The primary focus will be on executing production acceleration initiatives.

data.title: Electrolux Group to end production in Jászberény, Hungary
data.description: Electrolux Group recently announced its decision to halt production at the Jászberény, Hungary factory, known for manufacturing built-in and freestanding refrigeration products. The production shutdown is scheduled to be completed by the conclusion of 2026. As a result of this restructuring move, the company will incur a hefty restructuring charge of about SEK (mention the specific amount).

data.title: Kyverna Therapeutics (KYTX) Stock Surges 24% After Hours: Why Is It Moving?
data.description: Kyverna Therapeutics Inc. saw a significant 24% surge in their stock price, reaching $12.04 post-market on Tuesday. This increase came after the positive results from the registrational trial for miv-cel in stiff person syndrome were unveiled at the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting in Chicago. The single-dose CAR T-cell therapy met its primary endpoint, showcasing a notable 46% median improvement in the Timed 25-Foot Walk at 16 weeks. Out of the 26 patients included in the study, all of whom had halted chronic immunotherapies, 81% experienced a substantial enhancement, with a minimum 20% increase in walking speed from their baseline. Kyverna Therapeutics emphasized that stiff person syndrome impacts approximately 6,000 individuals in the U.S., yet there are currently no FDA-approved treatments accessible for this condition. CEO Warner Biddle expressed optimism, stating, "We see compelling evidence that a one-time therapy can reset the immune system." For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: NEW TELE-DENTISTRY PROGRAMME SUPPORTS EARLY INTERVENTION FOR CHILDREN AT RISK OF CARIES
data.description: A new collaborative program in Singapore launched on April 22, 2026, focuses on supporting vulnerable families by providing personalized insights and clear guidance for their children's oral care. This initiative aims to empower parents by offering prioritized recommendations. In the past, dental care choices for many families were typically reactive, with decisions made when issues arose. This program seeks to change the approach by proactively offering support and resources to improve oral health in children.
Russian man who was planning to carry out an explosion at Defense Ministry facilities has been arrested in Moscow, the Federal Security Service (FSB) announced.
Two fatalities were reported after a drone attack caused a residential building collapse in Syzran, Russia, RIA says.

data.title: From Asphalt to the Alps: How Brazilian Paralympians Redefined Winter Sports, Supported as Part of Team TCL
data.description: In Brazil's capital, Brasilia, on April 22, 2026, it was revealed that Cristian Ribera and Aline Rocha achieved remarkable success at the Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026. Despite not training on snow, Ribera, aged 23, accomplished a historic feat by winning a silver medal at the event. The unconventional training grounds of the athletes make their achievement even more impressive, showcasing their dedication and skill in the competition.

data.title: Correction: Corbion announces quarterly sales of € 293.7m and Adjusted EBITDA of € 37.8m; maintains full-year outlook
data.description: Amsterdam-based sustainable ingredients company, Corbion, known for its focus on preservation through scientific applications, has released its Q1 2026 results ending on March 31. In Q1 2026, the company reported a -4.1% organic sales growth, with volume/mix down by -2.6% and prices by -1.5%. Total sales for the quarter stood at €293.7 million, while adjusted EBITDA was reported at €37.8 million and operating profit at €14.7 million. Looking ahead to the full year of 2026, the company has affirmed its outlook. For Q1 2026, the total growth was noted at €293.7 million, while organic growth remained unchanged. More details on this news are available on Benzinga.com.
